title: Just More Enchants
description: this mod adds a few new enchants
body:
![Just More Enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ce452c2e8b07ec365bcc5f77d510d742775db97.png)

Just More Enchants that mod adds a lot of new enchants (4 so far, to be exact.) The enchants add some really cool things, like the Molten enchant, which, if equipped on a chest plate, has a less than 50% chance of setting a mob that hits you on fire.

Current Enchant List:

Enchant Molten           When equipped on a chest plate, any mob that hits you has a chance of being set on fire.

Enchant Shockwave             Has a 30% chance of creating a shockwave that pushes back and damages enemies 

Enchant Vampirism              Gives you a chance to drain life from an enemy with each hit.

Enchant Freezing            Hitting an enemy has a 20% chance of freezing them for 1.5 seconds.

Enchant Thundering      A sword with this enchantment has about a 15% chance of striking an enemy with lightning.

Enchant Explosive           You can equip it to a bow or crossbow. There's a 20% chance that when you shoot an arrow at a mob, it will explode.

Enchant Beheading          you have a 60% chance that after killing a mob, its head will drop (does not work on wither skeletons)

Enchant Venom           you have a 20% chance to poison a mob after hitting it

Enchant Levitation    after shooting an arrow at a mob you have a chance to give it a levitation effect

Enchant Blindness     After hitting a mob with an arrow, you have a chance to give it the blindness effect
